mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT TRX_CD AS trxCd ,TRX_CD_NM AS trxCdNm ,MNG_SYS_CD AS mngSysCd ,TRX_CD_DESC AS trxCdDesc ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBTRXCD WHERE 1=1
AND TRX_CD like CONCAT('%',#{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{trxCdNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MNG_SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{mngSysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{trxCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by TRX_CD, MNG_SYS_CD ) p , (SELECT @rownum := 0) r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBTRXCD WHERE 1=1
AND TRX_CD like CONCAT('%',#{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{trxCdNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MNG_SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{mngSysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND TRX_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{trxCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT TRX_CD AS trxCd ,TRX_CD_NM AS trxCdNm ,MNG_SYS_CD AS mngSysCd ,TRX_CD_DESC AS trxCdDesc FROM TBTRXCD WHERE TRX_CD = #{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND MNG_SYS_CD = #{mngSysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
